def positive_sqlalchemy_session_not_closed():
    rule_id = "sqlalchemy_session_not_closed"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "SQLAlchemy Session objects are created without context-manager or close handling."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
